firstaid.emergency_desc: Stay calm. Assess the safety of the scene before helping.
firstaid.title: First Aid
firstaid.subtitle: Quick instructions for medical emergencies.
firstaid.burns_desc: Thermal burns from fire or hot objects.
firstaid.burns_step1: Cool the burn with cool water for 15-20 minutes.
firstaid.burns_step3: Apply a sterile dressing. Do not pop blisters!
firstaid.fever_step1: Ensure fresh air and drink plenty of water.
firstaid.fever_step3: Wipe the body with room-temp water cloth.
firstaid.cuts_step1: Wash the wound with clean water.
firstaid.cuts_step2: Apply firm pressure to stop bleeding.
firstaid.cuts_step3: Call an ambulance for severe bleeding.
firstaid.choking_step1: Stand behind the person and wrap arms around them.
firstaid.fractures_step1: Ensure rest. Do not try to reset the bone!
firstaid.fractures_step2: Immobilize the limb with a splint.
firstaid.fractures_step3: Apply cold and call for medical help.
firstaid.allergy_step3: Call an ambulance if breathing is difficult.
firstaid.fainting_step1: Lay the person down and elevate legs.
firstaid.poisoning_step1: Food: drink water and induce vomiting.
firstaid.poisoning_step3: WARNING: Do not induce vomiting for acids!
